MOTION To Appoint David O¿Brien As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer L. Alesio, Esq. of Brayton Purcell 415-898-1247, appearing for plaintiff / moving party Michael O'Brien

Ruling:
No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL O'BRIEN'S MOTION To Appoint David O'Brien As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 =(302/PJM/JU)
